verdicts.note: Homelessness services and behavioral-health priorities lean toward prevention and services, but the dossier does not describe a comprehensive public-safety mechanism warranting the maximal +2 placement.

missing.basis: Her platform combines Medicare for All, affordable housing, labor support, disability rights, and progressive revenue, directly supporting broad expanded public provision.

review_notes: All 7 original candidate-axis pairs were reviewed exactly once (6 upheld, 1 adjust). One directly supported omitted axis is proposed.
